meaning: adj.未受伤害的,太太平平的
examples: The child was found abandoned but unharmed.
The force that he used should have broken all my ribs, but when he let me go, I was unharmed and I laughed.
During his career, he has trapped at least 2, 000 bears alive, and returned them unharmed to the wild.
He was unharmed by the blast and later interviewed by CNN about his experience.
